params.SpellDescription: Put a lore counter on target Saga you control or remove one from it. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Put a lore counter on target Saga you control or remove one from it. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you put a lore counter on a Saga you control, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one other target creature.
